title: OCI Functions
summary: Leading product for OCI Functions across execution model, platform primitives, and developer experience.
details: Focused on reducing migration friction and making the platform easier to adopt for real workloads.
Worked on AI-assisted deployment and troubleshooting workflows using reusable skills and MCP-style integrations.
Spend a lot of time on the unglamorous parts of platform trust: packaging, debugging, first-run experience, and operational clarity.

title: OCI Kubernetes Engine and Serverless
summary: Led strategy across OCI Kubernetes Engine and OCI Functions with a heavy focus on AI/ML infrastructure needs and adoption quality.
details: Drove targeted investments in Ubuntu support, GPU add-ons, and observability tooling.
Spent a lot of time balancing roadmap asks against the needs that actually moved usage.
Learned how often infrastructure products are judged less by architecture and more by how debuggable they feel under pressure.

title: OCI DevOps / CI/CD
summary: Led strategy and development for OCI's DevOps portfolio from early concept through launch and internal adoption.
details: Launched Service Installer, a region build orchestration platform that codified deployment sequencing for 250+ OCI services.
Helped cut software delivery time from roughly 3 months to 30 days.
Launched a feature registry with health and dependency tracing that reduced root-cause analysis time by 60%.

title: Earlier work
summary: Worked across enterprise implementation and hardware program management before moving deeper into platform product roles.
details: Led implementation work for enterprise customers with complex operational environments.
Managed roadmap planning, validation, and release execution for new product programs at Cisco.
Built a Python automation script that cut compliance certification lead time by roughly 50%.
